name: Obsolete Souls™
short_description: Obsolete Souls™ is a turn based RPG with a touch of hip-hop! Journey through Earth Alpha with a cast of goons trying to save the universe from it's inevitable demise.
detailed_description: Join an unfortunate cast of characters in a wild story of trusting fate. Upon being forced into a journey to save the planet, they realize that saving their planet isn't enough. Their entire universe is in danger. Play through the hardships that these characters face as they deal with failure, injustice, and regret, as they attempt to save their home from the gods of the past. Obsolete Souls™ is sure to please fans of turn based role-playing games while also adding a touch of hip-hop!
